title: Investigative Reporting
description: In-depth investigations into complex issues, combining data analysis, document research, and on-the-ground reporting.

title: Narrative Journalism
description: Long-form storytelling that brings complex issues to life through compelling narratives and human stories.

title: Data Journalism
description: Data-driven reporting that uses computational methods to uncover patterns and tell stories hidden in numbers.

title: Multimedia Storytelling
description: Combining text, photography, video, and interactive elements to create immersive journalistic experiences.
